Description.DefaultValue:
Attack: single target, 1 hit 

Places on target Decrease DEF 60% for 2 turns with 75% chance.

Gain an Extra Turn with 30% chance.

Attack: single target, 1 hit.

Destroy 20% of target's MAX HP up to 40% of MAX HP left. Deson't work on bosses. 

Increase own HP by the amount of HP destroyed, up to 60,000 HP.

If used against bosses, increases own MAX HP by 15,000 up to 60,000.

If incoming damage exceeds 50% of max HP, reduce damage taken to 50% of HP and gain an Extra Turn. Doesn't work on Bosses. Damage is calculated for skill, not individual instances of damage

Receives 15% less damage from Bosses. If 4750 is in your team, receive 30% damage instead.

Attack: single target, 1 hit

Ignores 75% of target's DEF, Unkillable and Block damage buffs.

If this attack kills the target, places on it Block revive and gain an Extra turn.
